Title: Output
Description: End-cap landmark that sets the hex's primary color from a Number (grayscale 0-255) or PositionVar (x/y/z as R/G/B 0-255). Output's Next slot is empty at craft time and terminates the branch; when another hex is dragged onto this one in casting mode, Output's Next is populated at drop time and the attached chain runs with the color already applied.

color.Label: Color
color.Description: Number for grayscale (0-255) or PositionVar for RGB (x=R, y=G, z=B, 0-255 each)
